arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham interested in signing Kingsley Coman
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, Arsenal and Tottenham are interested in signing Kingsley Coman (28) during the summer transfer window. The France international has informed Bayern Munich that he wishes to leave…

arts.ttl: Eight players may miss Wolves vs Tottenham after Ange Postecoglou injury update
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will still be without Dejan Kulusevski and Kevin Danso when they play Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League this weekend. September saw Yerson Mosquera become another to sustain the season-ending blow while playing against Aston Villa in their fifth Premier League match this term.

arts.ttl: Tottenham early team news hints for Wolves as Ange Postecoglou set for major changes
arts.sum: The club featured photos of Maddison and Solanke in their matchday graphic posted across social media channels on Sunday morning. Tottenham Hotspur have hinted at the involvement of Dominic Solanke and James Maddison against Wolverhampton Wanderers despite Ange Postecoglou acknowledging that there will be rotation for the Premier League match.

arts.ttl: Club looking to beat competition from Tottenham and Brighton – Contact to be made soon
arts.sum: Juventus signed Renato Veiga on loan from Chelsea in January but there is now interest from Tottenham and Brighton, as they look to bring the defender back to the Premier League. Despite being injured for a few weeks, Veiga has impressed during his short time in Turin. arts.ttl: Tottenham unwilling to pay forward’s €55m asking price
arts.sum: Tottenham are aiming to significant improve on their disappointing efforts in the Premier League, and that will come in the summer with the expectation of significant signings. And one of those could involve a player that is already on their books.
